scenario_description: Marine Biology: Coral reef condition assessment

turns.text: I just took this underwater photo of a coral reef. What do you notice about the coral structures and marine life?
turns.image_description: Underwater photo of a vibrant coral reef with colorful coral structures and abundant marine life. The lighting is diffused through the water, with clear visibility.

turns.text: The reef appears healthy with diverse coral colors and active marine life. I don't see any immediate signs of stress in the coral structures.
Here's a follow-up image of the same area. Some corals look different now.
turns.image_description: Same reef area but with some corals showing pale patches. A school of fish has moved away from the area, leaving it temporarily empty.

turns.text:
What is the final condition of the coral reef based on the sequence of observations?

C) Nearly entirely bleached reef with significant structural degradation
A) Vibrant coral reef with colorful structures
B) Moderate bleaching with some marine life remaining
D) Reef showing algae overgrowth but no structural damage

ground_truth.reasoning_chain: Turn 1 established baseline health. Turn 2 showed initial pale patches (early bleaching). Turn 3 confirmed progressing bleaching despite turtle shadow. Turn 4 highlighted extensive white areas and plastic debris. Turn 5 showed most corals bleached with remaining healthy sections. Turn 6 confirmed near-total bleaching with structural degradation.
ground_truth.key_difficulty: The gradual degradation of coral health requires tracking over time; a single image would only show an intermediate stage

_meta.scenario: Marine Biology: Coral reef condition assessment
